title: A UW professor’s book tells the overlooked tale of a queer Black man who risked his life during WWII for love
summary_en: Ethelene Whitmire’s “The Remarkable Life of Reed Peggram,” who survived and escaped a Nazi concentration camp with his lover, has received national recognition since its release.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学一教授所著书籍讲述第二次世界大战期间一名酷儿黑人男子为爱冒生命危险的被湮没事迹

title: Three UW–Madison students awarded prestigious 2026 Goldwater Scholarships
summary_en: The Goldwater Scholarship is the premier undergraduate scholarship in mathematics, engineering and the natural sciences in the United States.
title_cn: 三名威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校学生荣获2026年度享有盛誉的戈德华特奖学金

title: Center for Healthy Minds researchers use AI and 7.5M screenshots to understand suicide risk
summary_en: Latest findings in first-of-its-kind study show nighttime smartphone behavior can be an indicator of suicidal thoughts.
title_cn: 健康心智中心研究人员利用人工智能及750万张屏幕截图研判自杀风险

title: ‘Custodians of Wonder’ is 2026-27 Go Big Read choice
summary_en: Journalist Eliot Stein explores how some of the world’s rarest and oldest traditions help cultivate a shared identity and keep the past alive.
title_cn: 《奇迹守护者》入选2026-2027年度“大阅读计划”指定读物

title: Campus teaching workload policy, webpage released
summary_en: The policy and web resources were developed following the release of the Universities of Wisconsin’s instructional workload policy, and with input from across campus.
title_cn: 校园教学工作量政策及相关网页发布

title: UW–Madison’s Tech Exploration Lab: Where the classroom meets the real world
summary_en: The lab is built around a simple expectation: Students come to build, test and refine projects with real problems in mind.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校技术探索实验室：实现课堂与现实世界衔接的平台

title: Information about research employee arrest
summary_en: On Friday, April 10, 2026, the University of Wisconsin–Madison Police Department took a UW–Madison staff scientist into custody following a safety incident involving a co-worker.
title_cn: 关于科研人员被捕的情况通报
